name: Harpie's Pet Dragon - Fearsome Fire Blast
name_jp: ハーピィズペット<ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－セイント・ファイアー・ギガ
name_jp_rom: Hāpyizu Petto Doragon - Seinto Faiā Giga
name_jp_tl: Harpie's Pet Dragon - Saint Fire Giga
desc: Monsters cannot target Level 6 or lower "Harpie" monsters for attacks. You can only use each of the following effects of "Harpie's Pet Dragon - Fearsome Fire Blast" once per turn. If you control a Level 6 or lower WIND monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can send 1 WIND Winged Beast monster from your Deck to the GY.
mnst_eff: Monsters cannot target Level 6 or lower "Harpie" monsters for attacks. You can only use each of the following effects of "Harpie's Pet Dragon - Fearsome Fire Blast" once per turn. If you control a Level 6 or lower WIND monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can send 1 WIND Winged Beast monster from your Deck to the GY.
eff: Monsters cannot target Level 6 or lower "Harpie" monsters for attacks. You can only use each of the following effects of "Harpie's Pet Dragon - Fearsome Fire Blast" once per turn. If you control a Level 6 or lower WIND monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can send 1 WIND Winged Beast monster from your Deck to the GY.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
